title: dianthus caryophyllus subsp. arrostoi
intro: Dianthus caryophyllus subsp. arrostoi, also known as the fragrant pink clover, is a subspecies of the carnation plant that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dianthus caryophyllus subsp. arrostoi include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
